# photoTime

**Instance Property**

The offset, in seconds, from the beginning of the Live Photo’s duration to the time corresponding to its still photo.

## Declaration

```swift
var photoTime: CMTime { get }
```

## Discussion

To create time-based effects in your [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhotoEditingContext/frameProcessor] block, use this property together with the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhotoEditingContext/duration] property.

## Examining an Editing Context’s Live Photo

- **fullSizeImage**: The unedited still photo content of the Live Photo.
- **duration**: The duration, in seconds, of the Live Photo.
- **orientation**: The image orientation of the Live Photo.
